decks.notes: The main concept of this Combo - Oops, All Spells! Legacy deck is to quickly cast a series of spells that allow the player to mill their entire deck, putting key combo pieces like Thassa's Oracle and Dread Return into the graveyard. Once the deck is milled, the player can win the game by either casting Thassa's Oracle or Dread Return to bring back a win condition creature. The deck focuses on fast mana generation with cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Dark Ritual to quickly assemble the combo and win the game before the opponent can stop it.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the graveyard as a resource to bring back powerful creatures and generate advantage through sacrificing creatures like Narcomoeba and Poxwalkers to trigger abilities like Bridge from Below. The deck focuses on using cards like Faithless Looting and Breakthrough to fill the graveyard quickly, and then combo off with cards like Dread Return and Lion's Eye Diamond to bring back threats like Golgari Grave-Troll and Ashen Rider. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and explosive graveyard-based strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of disruption, card advantage, and efficient threats to control the game tempo and pressure the opponent. By combining powerful cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student with aggressive creatures like Nethergoyf and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure to close out the game quickly. With a mix of disruption, card draw, and threats, this Aggro Dimir Tempo deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to use cards like Mystic Forge and Urza's Saga to generate mana and combo pieces quickly, allowing the player to potentially win the game in a few turns. The deck also includes cards like Voltaic Key and Manifold Key to untap artifacts and generate more mana, as well as Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator to tutor for combo pieces. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling key artifacts and utilizing them efficiently to create a powerful board state and win the game.

The deck focuses on efficiently deploying threats and disrupting the opponent's game plan early on through cards like Delver of Secrets, Lightning Bolt, Daze, and Force of Will. It also aims to control the board with cards like Wasteland and Dragon's Rage Channeler while deploying threats like Questing Druid and Murktide Regent to apply pressure. The deck utilizes cards like Ponder and Brainstorm to dig for key spells and maintain card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to be fast and aggressive, while also having disruptive elements to control the game.

The deck focuses on using disruptive spells and efficient creature threats to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan while keeping up pressure with aggressive plays. It combines hand disruption like Thoughtseize with efficient removal like Fatal Push and counterspells like Force of Will to control the game, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower to end the game quickly. The deck aims to maintain card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student while utilizing its mana base to create tempo advantages with cards like Daze and Wasteland.

The main concept of this Dragon Stompy deck is to aggressively deploy powerful threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan through lockout effects. By using mana acceleration and disruptive artifacts like Chalice of the Void, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with its dragon creatures and powerful spells. The combination of aggressive creatures like Pyrogoyf and Hexing Squelcher with powerful removal spells like Fury and Sundering Eruption allows the deck to control the game and secure victory through relentless pressure. The deck's synergy with artifacts and efficient mana usage make it a formidable force in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on rapidly getting powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand onto the battlefield through cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By rapidly dropping these massive creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own board presence. The deck also includes counter magic and card draw to control the game and ensure its combo pieces can come together quickly and efficiently. This deck is built for explosive plays and high-risk, high-reward strategies.

The deck aims to quickly mill itself by using cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to get key combo pieces into the graveyard, then use reanimation spells like Reanimate to bring back powerful creatures like Thassa's Oracle to win the game instantly. It also includes disruptive elements like Cabal Therapy and Pact of Negation to protect the combo. The deck relies on fast mana from cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to quickly execute its game plan and win before the opponent has a chance to stop it.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a powerful mana engine using Cloudposts and ramp spells like Grim Monolith to generate large amounts of mana. The goal is to cast big Eldrazi threats like Ulamog and Thought-Knot Seer while also using Karn, the Great Creator to shut down opposing strategies. Trinisphere and Chalice of the Void help disrupt opponents while cards like The One Ring and Eye of Ugin provide additional utility and card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its powerful threats and efficient mana production.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combination of cards and generating a large storm count to cast game-ending spells like Tendrils of Agony or Ad Nauseam. It emphasizes fast mana acceleration and efficient card draw/filtering to find key combo pieces quickly. The deck also includes a toolbox of versatile cards like Duress and Burning Wish to effectively disrupt the opponent's game plan and adapt to different situations. The goal is to create a critical mass of spells in a single turn to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a massive storm turn.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through countering and disrupting the opponent's plays while utilizing the Stiflenought combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly bring out a powerful threat. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Dress Down help with card selection and interaction. The deck also includes various removal spells and a few utility creatures like Doorkeeper Thrull and Nulldrifter for additional value. The mana base is focused on fetching dual lands and utilizing Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The overall strategy is to control the game and win through a powerful combo or attrition.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost ninja creatures to quickly and efficiently deal damage to the opponent while disrupting their game plan with countermagic and removal spells. By combining powerful creatures like Yuriko and Ingenious Infiltrator with cards like Brainstorm and Force of Will, this deck aims to gain card advantage and maintain control of the board. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Orcish Bowmasters provides extra utility and versatility in dealing with various threats. The mana base is built to support a fast and consistent gameplay.

This deck aims to quickly combo off by milling your entire library with cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, triggering Narcomoeba and Bridge from Below to generate a board presence, and then win the game with Thassa's Oracle or a large number of Poxwalkers. The deck utilizes a mix of fast mana, discard spells like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy, and protection in the form of Pact of Negation to ensure a successful combo turn. The key strategy is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to overwhelm the opponent before they can respond.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly ramp up mana using City of Traitors, Ancient Tomb, and Chrome Mox to cast powerful dragon creatures like Hexing Squelcher and Broadside Bombardiers. The deck also utilizes Chalice of the Void and Sundering Eruption to disrupt opponents' strategies while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The inclusion of cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal allows for explosive plays, and The One Ring provides a powerful late-game threat. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast mana acceleration and impactful dragon creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble a powerful combo using Mystic Forge and various artifacts like Grim Monolith, Manifold Key, and The One Ring to generate mana and card advantage. Karn, the Great Creator is used to search for key pieces while Planar Nexus can be used to take extra turns to secure the win. The deck also features cards like Kozilek's Command and Glaring Fleshraker for disruption and control options. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently set up its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board state.
